text:
Living a healthy life means more than just avoiding illness. It involves taking care of your body and mind. A balanced diet with fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives you energy. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling for thirty minutes a day, keeps your heart strong and your body flexible.

However, health also includes rest. Getting seven to nine hours of quality sleep each night helps your brain recover and manage stress. Finally, do not forget your mental health. Finding a good work-life balance is essential. Make time for hobbies, family, and relaxation. By combining good food, activity, rest, and calm, you can feel your best every day.
